message.content:
@startuml
title Get Authority

participant "MBO" as MBO #90EE90
participant "TrainController" as TrainController #98FB98

box "MBO Receives Position and Transmits Authority" over * 
  activate MBO
  
  note right of MBO : receiveTrainPosition(String)
  
  MBO ->> TrainController: getPosition(String)
  activate TrainController
  
  return trainPosition[2] 
  
  deactivate TrainController
  
  note left of MBO : calculateAuthority(String)
  
  loop transmitMboAuthority(String, double[]) {
    setMboAuthority(String,double);
    
    alt if authority > maxSpeed then
    
      else
      
        end
        
          endif
            
            stop
                
              } // End Loop for transmitting authorities from MBOS to trains via TCs/VCUs etc.. 

@enduml
